hero.subtitle: I certify critical financial software for Grupo Aval entities (PSE Avanza, SPI/BRE-B) running 200+ test cases per cycle at SQA. In parallel I build modern web apps as a freelance Full Stack dev with React, Next.js, Vue 3 and Node.js.

about.sectionTitle: Certified Banking QA Engineer + Freelance Full Stack Developer.
about.paragraph1: I've spent 2 years as a QA Engineer at SQA certifying critical financial software for Grupo Aval entities. I've contributed to the certification of products like PSE Avanza and SPI/BRE-B, running 200+ test cases per cycle and validating transactional flows, banking messaging and business rules.
about.paragraph2: In parallel I work as a freelance Full Stack Developer: I build web apps with React, Next.js, Vue 3 and Node.js connected to Supabase, PostgreSQL and Oracle. I automate E2E tests with Serenity BDD (Java + Cucumber + Screenplay), Postman and SoapUI.
about.paragraph3: I write code thinking about how it can break — and deliver products that come pre-tested.

services.sectionTitle: Three ways to work with me.
services.sectionDesc: From freelance web projects to financial-product certification. Pick the one you need — or combine them.

dev.title: Full Stack Development
dev.desc: I build custom web apps with a modern JavaScript stack, database integration and production-ready deployments.

qa.title: QA Automation
qa.desc: I design and build automated test suites so your product ships to production with fewer defects and more speed.
bullets: API testing with Postman and SoapUI

banking.title: Banking QA Consulting
banking.desc: Support for the certification of critical financial software, drawing on experience certifying Grupo Aval products.
bullets: Oracle DB testing and Jira traceability

competencies.sectionDesc: The stack I build with and the stack I test with. Combining them is what makes the difference.

bot.title: Nursing Chat-bot
bot.desc: Intelligent system for managing reservations and attention in nursing laboratories, developed with React and Supabase.
bot.qaNote: Validation of booking flows, error handling and chat edge cases. Documented manual testing + cases designed for E2E automation.

domi.title: Domi-SaaS
domi.desc: SaaS platform for delivery management and real-time tracking, optimizing delivery logistics.
domi.qaNote: Test plan designed for order flows, courier assignment and real-time geolocation. Edge cases: signal loss, concurrent orders and retries.

erp.title: Inventory System
erp.desc: Scalable inventory and booking solutions for distributors and sports complexes, focused on streamlining business processes.
erp.qaNote: Stock integrity tests, booking concurrency and business-rule validation. Test matrix designed for inventory, sales and reporting modules.

contact.desc: I'm open to job opportunities and freelance projects where full stack development and a QA mindset add value. Drop me a line and let's talk.
